text:
Once upon a time there was a curious hedgehog. This hedgehog spent its day exploring abandoned houses.

One day, it stumbled upon an old wardrobe full of outdated Christmas decorations. Intrigued, the hedgehog crawled inside. To its delight, it found a cozy nest of feathers.

Each day after that, the hedgehog visited the wardrobe. It slept amidst ornaments and enjoyed its silly feathers. It became quite famous in the forest.

Years passed. Someone lost interest in tacky decorations. They gave the wardrobe away.

Nowadays, the hedgehog wears a tiny Christmas whistle. Whenever it feels happy, it blows it.

That’s its favorite story. Always remembering the joy in simple things.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
